ai_tools.name: Suno
ai_tools.description: Generate full songs — vocals, instruments, lyrics — from a text prompt in seconds. Suno v4 produces radio-quality tracks across any genre.

ai_tools.name: Hex
ai_tools.description: Open-source macOS app that transcribes your voice and pastes it anywhere — instantly. Press-and-hold a hotkey, speak, release. Powered by Parakeet TDT v3 & WhisperKit. Fast, multilingual, runs on-device.

ai_tools.name: DrawPen
ai_tools.description: Free, open-source screen annotation tool. Draw, highlight, and annotate on top of any screen in real-time — perfect for live coding sessions, AI demos, presentations, and remote meetings.

ai_tools.name: Napkin AI
ai_tools.description: Turn text into visual diagrams instantly. Paste or type your content and Napkin's AI auto-generates charts, flowcharts, and infographics for business storytelling. No design skills needed.

ai_tools.name: Gamma
ai_tools.description: AI-powered platform to create stunning presentations, documents, and webpages in minutes. Enter a prompt and Gamma generates a full deck with layout, content, and design. Export to PDF, PPTX, or share as a live link.

ai_tools.name: Hotpot.ai
ai_tools.description: All-in-one AI image editor. Remove backgrounds, restore old photos, colorize images, upscale resolution, and generate AI art. Simple, fast, and no design skills required.

ai_tools.name: Remusic — AI Vocal Remover
ai_tools.description: Separate vocals from any song in seconds. Extract instrumentals, isolate lead vocals, drums, and bass tracks using AI. Great for karaoke, remixes, and music production.

ai_tools.name: Kimi Slides
ai_tools.description: AI-powered PPT generator by Moonshot AI. Describe your topic and Kimi creates a full presentation with structured slides, visuals, and content — in seconds.

ai_tools.name: Text Behind Image
ai_tools.description: Create the viral 'text behind image' effect instantly. Upload a photo, type your text, and the tool intelligently places it behind subjects in the image for a stunning depth effect.

ai_tools.name: Infographics.so
ai_tools.description: Generate beautiful, data-rich infographics from text or data in seconds using AI. Perfect for reports, social media, and presentations without hiring a designer.

popular_skills.name: Claude Frontend Design Skill
popular_skills.description: Anthropic's official Claude Code skill for generating production-grade, visually distinctive frontends. Teaches bold aesthetic thinking — typography, color, motion, spatial composition — and avoids generic 'AI slop' patterns. Used by 18k+ agents.

popular_skills.name: skills.sh — Agent Skills Directory
popular_skills.description: The open registry for AI agent skills. Discover, install, and share reusable capabilities for Claude, Copilot, and other agents with a single `npx skills add` command. 90k+ total installs. Top skills include frontend-design, RAG, prompt engineering, and more.

powerful_websites.name: Modal
powerful_websites.description: Serverless cloud compute for AI workloads. Run Python functions on GPUs at scale with zero infrastructure management. Perfect for AI agents and batch jobs.

powerful_websites.name: 21st.dev
powerful_websites.description: Open-source registry of production-ready UI components + Agents SDK to ship AI-powered products faster. Browse, copy, and integrate animated components built for the agentic web. Think npm for UI, but with live previews.

powerful_websites.name: Remove Paywall
powerful_websites.description: Bypass paywalls on news articles and websites instantly. Just paste the URL and read any article for free — no subscriptions, no signups. Supports most major publications.

powerful_websites.name: Archive Buttons
powerful_websites.description: One-click access to archived versions of any webpage via the Wayback Machine, Archive.today, and more. Never lose a webpage to link rot again.

powerful_websites.name: Cart-Art
powerful_websites.description: Turn any image into ASCII or pixel art, right in your browser. A fun creative tool for developers who love text-based aesthetics.

powerful_websites.name: Rasterbator
powerful_websites.description: Turn any image into a massive multi-page poster you can print and assemble. Upload a photo, choose the size, and download a PDF ready for printing on standard paper.

powerful_websites.name: Y2Doc — YouTube to Document
powerful_websites.description: Convert any YouTube video into a clean, structured document or article. Great for summarising long lectures, podcasts, or tutorials into readable notes.

powerful_websites.name: VCC Generator
powerful_websites.description: Generate test credit card numbers for development and QA purposes. Useful when building and testing payment flows without using real card data.

youtube_videos.title: How I use LLMs
youtube_videos.description: Andrej Karpathy (ex-OpenAI, Tesla AI) shares his personal workflow for using large language models effectively. A must-watch for anyone building with or learning about LLMs.

youtube_videos.title: Agentic Workflows (6hr full course)
youtube_videos.description: A comprehensive 6-hour deep dive into building agentic workflows from scratch. Covers agent architectures, tool use, planning, and real-world automation patterns.
